title: helmia aspera
intro: Helmia aspera, also known as the rough helmia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helmia aspera include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Helmia aspera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
